text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Silence Suzuka has received a letter from a fan.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: A letter? Oh, it's from a young Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yes... It's thanks to my fans' support that I'm able
to enter certain races.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Still, it does feel a little strange.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm often complimented on my racing...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But I don't understand how people can just watch
on without feeling tempted to run themselves.
choice_data_list:
It's because watching you run is satisfying
enough.

It's because watching you run is satisfying
enough.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Interesting... So, that's how they feel.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Then... I suppose I'll have to make sure I keep
running the way I do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Silence Suzuka has come to better
understand the feelings of her supporters.
